GLULT.Item.ToggleHint: Mark this NPC action, strike, or spell as an Ultimate ability.
GLULT.Item.FunctionHint: Mark this ability as {function}. Abilities may perform more than one function.
GLULT.Charge.Label: Ultimate Charge
GLULT.Charge.ClockHint: Left-click to add charge; right-click to remove charge.
GLULT.Config.Title: {name} — Ultimate Configuration
GLULT.Config.RequiredHint: Choose 1–12 segments. Reaching the final segment reveals the charged token indicator.
GLULT.Config.IconHint: Enter any Font Awesome class available in Foundry, such as fa-solid fa-bolt.
GLULT.Config.CombatPromiseHint: One sentence: what this NPC does, the battlefield result, and how it reaches its climax.
GLULT.Config.GainRuleHint: Describe the broad event that earns one resource. Manual tracking remains authoritative; normally limit gain to once per round.
GLULT.Config.CashOutHint: Describe the state change, coordinated opportunity, or encounter payoff created by spending the resource.
GLULT.Config.TellHint: What visible stance, target, zone, object, or resource total warns the players?
GLULT.Config.ThreatHint: What happens if the players ignore the Ultimate?
GLULT.Config.CounterplayHint: Record at least two ways to cancel, weaken, narrow, delay, redirect, or endure the result.
GLULT.Notify.UsedEarly: {item} was used before it was charged ({value}/{max}); partial charge will be cleared.
GLULT.Notify.UpdateFailed: Could not update the Ultimate ability.
GLULT.Notify.DialogUnavailable: The Ultimate configuration dialog is unavailable in this Foundry version.
